creator: independent creator building a launch visual system
intent: turn a fuzzy visual idea into a reusable, publishable artifact without losing the seed
memory: the piece should feel calm, precise, and future-facing
the output must explain the idea to a collaborator in under 20 seconds
the visual grammar should survive as poster, deck, short, and browser board

grammar.layout: minimal command table wrapped by one expressive hero field
grammar.type: quiet editorial headline plus compact technical labels
grammar.color: warm monochrome base with one electric frontier accent per tool family
grammar.motion: still artifact now; future remix may animate capsule lanes left-to-right

remix_rule: Change surface, palette accent, and tool adapter freely; preserve creator intent, memory, blocked inputs, and proof path.
